description: Default Matrix agent — the per-user self/cloud runtime. Bundles filesystem + fetch + git MCP servers (Session 22 baseline) PLUS paxeer-net (the public Paxeer chain surface: 42 tools across RPC + PaxScan + Argus + price + agent-economy precompiles + embedded-wallet writes). READS need no auth; chain WRITES sign through the Paxeer Embedded Wallet (custody network-side, spend-policy enforced at the wallet API) and are additionally pre-gated plan-time by PaxeerSpendPolicy (per-call PAXEER_SPEND_CAP_WEI ceiling) before any side effect. Headless wallet auth via PAXEER_WALLET_TOKEN or PAXEER_WALLET_EMAIL+PAXEER_WALLET_PASSWORD (+PAXEER_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY); without it the chain bridge is read-only. PackageDigest values are PLACEHOLDERS; operators MUST replace with the sha256 digest of the actual installed package before any production / chain-anchoring deployment.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file (deprecated alias of read_text_file)

tools.name: read_text_file
tools.description: Read the contents of a text file

tools.name: read_media_file
tools.description: Read an image or audio file as base64

tools.name: read_multiple_files
tools.description: Read multiple files in a single call

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file (creates or overwrites)

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Apply line-based edits to a file

tools.name: create_directory
tools.description: Create a directory tree

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List entries in a directory

tools.name: list_directory_with_sizes
tools.description: List entries in a directory including byte sizes

tools.name: list_allowed_directories
tools.description: List the directories the server is permitted to access

tools.name: directory_tree
tools.description: Recursive tree view of a directory

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename a file

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Recursive glob search

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Stat a file or directory

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL and return its content as Markdown

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the public web for a query; returns ranked results (title, url, snippet) plus an optional synthesized answer. Pair with `fetch` to read a result URL in full. Read-only. args: query (required), max_results?, topic? (general|news), include_answer?

tools.name: web_news
tools.description: Search recent news for a query; returns ranked articles (title, url, snippet, published). Read-only. args: query (required), max_results?

tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.description: Navigate the shared headless browser to a URL.

tools.name: browser_navigate_back
tools.description: Go back to the previous page in history.

tools.name: browser_snapshot
tools.description: Capture an accessibility snapshot of the current page (preferred over screenshot for acting on elements).

tools.name: browser_take_screenshot
tools.description: Screenshot the current page (png/jpeg). For viewing only; use browser_snapshot to act.

tools.name: browser_click
tools.description: Click an element identified by a snapshot ref/selector.

tools.name: browser_type
tools.description: Type text into an editable element (optionally submit).

tools.name: browser_fill_form
tools.description: Fill multiple form fields in one call.

tools.name: browser_select_option
tools.description: Select option(s) in a dropdown.

tools.name: browser_press_key
tools.description: Press a keyboard key or character.

tools.name: browser_hover
tools.description: Hover the mouse over an element.

tools.name: browser_drag
tools.description: Drag and drop between two elements.

tools.name: browser_drop
tools.description: Drop files or MIME-typed data onto an element.

tools.name: browser_file_upload
tools.description: Upload one or more files to a file chooser.

tools.name: browser_handle_dialog
tools.description: Accept or dismiss a browser dialog (alert/confirm/prompt).

tools.name: browser_tabs
tools.description: List, create, close, or select a browser tab.

tools.name: browser_resize
tools.description: Resize the browser window.

tools.name: browser_close
tools.description: Close the current page.

tools.name: browser_wait_for
tools.description: Wait for text to appear/disappear or a fixed time to pass.

tools.name: browser_console_messages
tools.description: Return collected console messages.

tools.name: browser_network_requests
tools.description: List network requests made since page load.

tools.name: browser_network_request
tools.description: Full details (headers/body) of one network request by index.

tools.name: browser_evaluate
tools.description: Evaluate a JavaScript function on the page or an element. WARNING: arbitrary code execution.

tools.name: browser_run_code_unsafe
tools.description: Run an arbitrary Playwright code snippet in the server process. UNSAFE: RCE-equivalent on the shared browser host.

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show the working-tree status

tools.name: git_diff_unstaged
tools.description: Diff unstaged changes

tools.name: git_diff_staged
tools.description: Diff staged changes

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Diff between commits/branches

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Show commit history

tools.name: git_show
tools.description: Show a specific commit

tools.name: git_branch
tools.description: List branches

tools.name: git_add
tools.description: Stage files for commit

tools.name: git_reset
tools.description: Reset staged changes

tools.name: git_commit
tools.description: Create a commit from staged changes

tools.name: git_create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch

tools.name: git_checkout
tools.description: Switch branches

tools.name: shell
tools.description: Run a shell command (bash -lc) to completion and return exit code + stdout + stderr. Install deps, build, run scripts, inspect the filesystem. Runs in /workspace by default. For a process that must keep running use service_start. args: command (required), cwd?, timeout_ms?, env?.

tools.name: service_start
tools.description: Start or replace a long-lived background service that keeps running after the call and is respawned on machine restart (web servers, bots, workers). Output captured to a log. args: name (required), command (required), cwd?, env?, autostart?.

tools.name: service_list
tools.description: List supervised services with status (running/stopped), pid, uptime, command, cwd, log file. Read-only.

tools.name: service_logs
tools.description: Read the tail of a service's combined stdout+stderr log to verify or debug it. Read-only. args: name (required), lines?.

tools.name: service_stop
tools.description: Stop a supervised service (SIGTERM then SIGKILL the process group); disables autostart until restarted. args: name (required).

tools.name: service_restart
tools.description: Restart a supervised service from its recorded command and re-enable autostart. args: name (required).

tools.name: rpc_call
tools.description: Direct EVM JSON-RPC read against the Paxeer node (PAXEER_RPC_URL, default public-mainnet.rpcpaxeer.online/evm). Read-only.

tools.name: eth_call
tools.description: Read-only eth_call against a contract. Does NOT send a tx.

tools.name: contract_read
tools.description: Encode a method + eth_call + decode outputs (signature + outputs[]). Read-only.

tools.name: encode_call
tools.description: Pure ABI-encode a method call to 0x calldata. No network, no send. Used to build callData for schedule_job.

tools.name: chain_info
tools.description: Paxeer chain id, head block, sync status, RPC URL. Read-only.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Native PAX balance of an address (defaults to the agent wallet). Read-only.

tools.name: token_balance
tools.description: ERC-20 balance + symbol/decimals for a holder. Read-only.

tools.name: paxscan_get
tools.description: Generic PaxScan/Blockscout v2 GET passthrough (any documented route). Read-only.

tools.name: address_overview
tools.description: PaxScan address info + counters + token balances in one call. Read-only.

tools.name: address_transactions
tools.description: PaxScan transaction list for an address. Read-only.

tools.name: tx
tools.description: PaxScan transaction detail by hash. Read-only.

tools.name: token_info
tools.description: PaxScan token metadata + top holders. Read-only.

tools.name: search
tools.description: PaxScan global search (addresses, tokens, txs, blocks). Read-only.

tools.name: network_stats
tools.description: PaxScan network stats (gas, market, tx counts). Read-only.

tools.name: portfolio
tools.description: Argus portfolio indexer: pnl + rank + performance for an address. Read-only.

tools.name: trending
tools.description: Trending tokens from the discovery indexer. Read-only.

tools.name: price
tools.description: Off-chain price for PAX or a bridged major (pax|sol|eth|bnb|sid). Read-only.

tools.name: market_get
tools.description: Generic PaxSpot DEX market-data GET passthrough. Read-only.

tools.name: points
tools.description: Sidiora points/rewards balance for an address. Read-only.

tools.name: oracle_price
tools.description: OracleAggregator 0x0903 validator price for a market (bytes32). Read-only.

tools.name: orob_resolve
tools.description: OROB 0x0901 oracle-relative price from a basis-point offset. Read-only (pure).

tools.name: clearing_compute
tools.description: BatchClearing 0x0902 uniform-price clearing over buy/sell offset+size arrays. Read-only (pure).

tools.name: pofq_score
tools.description: PoFQ 0x0904 fill-quality / reputation score (fillPrice vs oraclePrice). Read-only (pure).

tools.name: stream_status
tools.description: PaymentStreams 0x0906 stream detail + accrued amount. Read-only.

tools.name: job_status
tools.description: Scheduler 0x0905 job detail. Read-only.

tools.name: jobs_pending
tools.description: Scheduler 0x0905 pending job ids for a creator (defaults to agent wallet). Read-only.

tools.name: delegation
tools.description: Staking 0x0800 delegation (shares + balance) for a validator. Read-only.

tools.name: wallet_info
tools.description: Resolve the agent embedded-wallet address + chain (provisions on first use). Network call to the custody API; no value moves.

tools.name: sign_message
tools.description: EIP-191 personal_sign a message with the agent wallet (proof of identity). Signs network-side; no value moves.

tools.name: transfer
tools.description: Send native PAX or an ERC-20. WRITE: signs+broadcasts via the embedded wallet; gated by PaxeerSpendPolicy.

tools.name: approve
tools.description: ERC-20 approve a spender (amount or 'max'). WRITE: signs+broadcasts via the embedded wallet; gated by PaxeerSpendPolicy.

tools.name: stream_open
tools.description: Open a PaymentStream 0x0906 (payee, token, ratePerSecond, cap?). WRITE: gated by PaxeerSpendPolicy.

tools.name: stream_settle
tools.description: Settle accrued on a stream (pays the payee). WRITE.

tools.name: stream_close
tools.description: Close a stream and refund the remainder. WRITE.

tools.name: stream_update_rate
tools.description: Change a stream's per-second rate. WRITE.

tools.name: schedule_job
tools.description: Schedule a future tx via Scheduler 0x0905 (target, callData, executeAtBlock, gasLimit, deposit). WRITE: funds a gas deposit; gated by PaxeerSpendPolicy.

tools.name: cancel_job
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled job and refund the deposit. WRITE.

tools.name: reschedule_job
tools.description: Move a scheduled job to a new block. WRITE.

tools.name: delegate
tools.description: Stake PAX to a validator (0x0800, paxvaloper...). WRITE: gated by PaxeerSpendPolicy.

tools.name: undelegate
tools.description: Unbond PAX from a validator. WRITE.

tools.name: redelegate
tools.description: Move stake between validators. WRITE: gated by PaxeerSpendPolicy.

tools.name: contract_write
tools.description: Sign+send a generic contract/precompile write (DEX swaps + any method). Provide signature+args or raw data, optional value. WRITE: gated by PaxeerSpendPolicy.
